root_source: workspace.FindRoot(cwd) inside fetchChildren — internal/phase already imports internal/workspace (derive.go) and internal/bead; no new dependency. AllStatuses("") degrades to builtins-only, which still contains 'blocked', so even a failed root resolution preserves the fix.
allstatuses_signature: func AllStatuses(root string) []string — returns []string{open,in_progress,blocked,closed + customs}; joinable via strings.Join(...,",") into one --status= arg
summary: Plan Bead 4 is cleanly implementable. (1) Root IS resolvable inside fetchChildren without changing the public GetChildren(epicID) signature: internal/phase/derive.go already imports both internal/bead and internal/workspace, so fetchChildren can call workspace.FindRoot(cwd) -> bead.AllStatuses(root). The plan names option (b) (derive root inside) and it is the cleanest, with option (c) as a graceful fallback: bead.CustomStatuses returns nil on any os.ReadFile/yaml error, so AllStatuses("") or a wrong root degrades to BuiltinStatuses() = {open,in_progress,blocked,closed} — which already includes the target 'blocked', so the fix's behavioral goal holds even if root resolution fails. No error path can break it. (2) AllStatuses returns a []string that strings.Join into a single comma-joined --status= arg, so the single-bd-call memoize contract is preserved — fetchChildren stays one listJSONFn call, TestCache_GetChildren_MemoizesPerEpic (1 call/epic) stays green. The plan explicitly mandates single comma-joined call and warns against the queryAllChildren per-status fan-out shape. (3) Behavioral correctness: widening to AllStatuses breadth aligns fetchChildren/GetChildren with advanceState->queryAllChildren (complete.go:856, which also uses bead.AllStatuses(root)) — the authority. blocked/custom children will now reach DerivePhaseFromChildren. (4) The hermetic RED test stubs listJSONFn, short-circuiting before any real config read, so it is independent of root resolution — the meaningful RED assertion is on the captured --status argv carrying 'blocked'. Minor non-blocking nit: the plan should specify which cwd FindRoot starts from (os.Getwd()) and that fetchChildren ignores FindRoot's error (use root="" on error -> builtins), to make the degrade-path explicit for the implementer.
